evals.prompt: Create a WowCommand and WowQuery pair for a user management domain. The command should create a new user with name and email. The query should fetch user by ID. Use @ahoo-wang/fetcher-wow package.
evals.expected_output: WowCommand and WowQuery implementations for user aggregate with proper typing

evals.prompt: Build a complete user aggregate with WowAggregate type that handles CreateUserCommand, UpdateUserCommand, and DeleteUserCommand. Include state management and proper command handling returning WowCommandResult.
evals.expected_output: User aggregate with multiple commands and state transitions

evals.prompt: Create a fetcher-based WowTransport that sends commands and queries to a Wow CQRS backend at https://api.example.com/wow. Show how to configure the transport with baseURL and handle the response types.
evals.expected_output: WowTransport configuration with Fetcher for sending commands/queries
